title: viola × bulgarica
intro: Viola × bulgarica, also known as Bulgarian Viola or Balkan Violet, is a hybrid species of flowering plant belonging to the Viola genus. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Viola × bulgarica include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and acting as an antibacterial agent to combat infections. Viola × bulgarica can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional folk remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
